questionHtml: Two products are in competitive supply. Using an example, outline how the supply for one of them is likely to be affected by an increase in the price of the other.

meta.title: Two products are in competitive supply. Using an example, outline how the supply for one of them is likely to be affected by an increase in the price of the other.
breadcrumbLabels: The non-price determinants of supply (factors that change supply or shift the supply curve)
